chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Ihram of a Menstruating Woman and One Experiencing Istihadah

text: 2763 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ فُضَيْلِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا طَافَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ طَوَافَ اَلنِّسَاءِ فَطَافَتْ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ اَلنِّصْفِ فَحَاضَتْ نَفَرَتْ إِنْ شَاءَتْ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2763 - Aban narrated from Fudhayl ibn Yasar, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said: "If a woman performs the Tawaf al-Nisa and completes more than half of it but then begins menstruating, she may depart if she wishes."
